scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend
